targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(ts, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time, nullIf(avgIf(hps, startsWith(machine, 'cuda/')), 0) AS cuda_hps, nullIf(avgIf(hps, startsWith(machine, 'native/')), 0) AS native_hps, nullIf(avgIf(hps, startsWith(machine, 'wasm/')), 0) AS wasm_hps FROM miner.events WHERE event = 'hashrate' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(ts, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time, avg(batch) AS batch, avg(workspaceMiB) AS workspace_mib, avg(freeMiB) AS free_vram_mib FROM miner.events WHERE event = 'cuda_batch' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT ts AS time, concat(machine, ' / rebalance batch') AS metric, toFloat64(batch) AS value FROM miner.events WHERE event = 'cuda_rebalance' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY time
SELECT count() AS accepted FROM miner.events WHERE event = 'share_accepted' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT count() AS blocks FROM miner.events WHERE event = 'block_found' AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, concat(machine, ' / ', event) AS metric, count() AS value FROM miner.events WHERE event IN ('cuda_pool_job', 'nonce_slot_exhausted') AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(ts, INTERVAL 10 SECOND) AS time, countIf(event = 'share_accepted') AS shares_accepted, countIf(event = 'share_rejected') AS shares_rejected, countIf(event = 'block_found') AS blocks_found, countIf(event = 'cuda_pool_job') AS cuda_pool_jobs, countIf(event = 'cuda_rebalance') AS cuda_rebalances, countIf(event = 'nonce_slot_exhausted') AS nonce_slots_exhausted, countIf(event = 'grind_error') AS grind_errors FROM miner.events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT ts, machine, event, hps, batch, freeMiB, jobId, token, message FROM miner.events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT machine, event, message, count() AS occurrences, max(ts) AS last_seen FROM miner.events WHERE message != '' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY machine, event, message ORDER BY occurrences DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 100
